stages.name: Equipment fails — search and dispatch
stages.description: Walk-in fails at lunch rush, fryer down at dinner service, banquet equipment fails 90 minutes before an event. Operator pulls phone, searches 'commercial appliance repair [city]' or 'near me,' dispatches the first credible local result with visible 24/7 capability.

stages.name: Evaluate & verify the partner
stages.description: For contract renewal, new vendor onboarding, or procurement evaluation: the buyer crosses references with peers, checks OEM authorizations, verifies CFESA / district-approved status, scans Google reviews and BBB. Three to five vendors are short-listed before any phone calls.

stages.name: Validate scale & consolidate
stages.description: For multi-unit operators and large institutional buyers: validation moves to LinkedIn (company size, leadership credentials), industry directories (CFESA member list, NRA member directories), and increasingly AI platforms ('best commercial kitchen repair company Houston'). One vendor across the portfolio wins the consolidation.
